section_title: Cost of voluntary winding up.-- All costs, charges and other expenditure properly incurred in the winding put
content:
313. Cost of voluntary winding up.-- All costs, charges and other expenditure properly incurred in the winding put
including the remuneration of the liquidator, shall subject to the rights of secured creditors, if any, be payable out of the
assets of the company in priority to all other claims.
